leadText: The Deep Sea Scale (Japanese: しんかいのウロコ Deep-Sea Scale), formatted DeepSeaScale prior to Generation VI and Deepseascale in the Pokémon Mystery Dungeon series, is a type of held item introduced in Generation III. It allows Clamperl to evolve into Gorebyss, and also boosts the Special Defense of a Clamperl that holds it.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] If held by Clamperl , doubles its Special Defense . Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Causes Clamperl to evolve into Gorebyss when traded while holding it. This consumes the Deep Sea Scale.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] If the player offers both a Link Cable and Deepseascale at Luminous Cave or Luminous Spring , Clamperl can be evolved into Gorebyss . This consumes the Link Cable and Deepseascale. If thrown, it will deal 1 damage (2 if sticky ). Using this item in a dungeon will consume it, with no effect.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] If held by Clamperl , doubles its Special Defense .
